items.title: Sony says your PlayStation won't check for game licenses every 30 days
items.summary: Rumors that Sony's new digital rights management (DRM) system might check PlayStation game licenses every 30 days appear not to be true.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.summary: Bitcoin traded near $75,600 on April 30 after the US Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged and flagged inflation risks. ETF outflows and macro uncertainty weighed on sentiment, w...
